home.subtitle: Hernando Rojas Rentería
home.title: "CHALO"
home.description: Exploring the intersection between memory, painting, and graphics since 1969. An intimate look at over four decades of creation with a presence in biennials across Europe and Latin America.

biografia.label: TRAJECTORY
biografia.title: Biography
biografia.bio_p1: Chalo is an artist whose practice explores the intersection between memory and matter. With more than four decades of career, his work has established itself as a reference in contemporary art, standing out for its capacity for formal synthesis and conceptual depth.
biografia.bio_p2: His work has been exhibited in the most prestigious galleries in Europe and Latin America, integrating public and private collections of great historical relevance.

contacto.intro: For acquisitions of original works or inquiries about special projects, please complete the following form.
